name: FO-6-1
description: Several Polyiso boards were left with the wrapping torn and exposed to the weather. Since exposure can lead to moisture of facer damage, the insulation should be checked before installation. Roof B and Roof A
comments: [{'issuecomment_id': '7222330', 'fk_issue': '4940497', 'comment': 'Closing issue.', 'created_name': 'Jaylin Freeman-Broadous', 'date_created': '02/12/2026 00:17:28 UTC'}, {'issuecomment_id': '7191107', 'fk_issue': '4940497', 'comment': 'Kodiak has removed and disposed of any insulation that had been exposed to moisture prior to being installed and covered with the single ply roofing membrane.', 'created_name': 'Keith Schmidt', 'date_created': '02/06/2026 22:34:08 UTC'}, {'issuecomment_id': '6750555', 'fk_issue': '4940497', 'comment': 'Any boards that show signs of getting wet or weathered should be pulled out and replaced so the system performs as intended.', 'created_name': 'Rolando Sanchez', 'date_created': '11/20/2025 14:52:50 UTC'}]

name: FO-2-1

comments: [{'issuecomment_id': '7191102', 'fk_issue': '4839560', 'comment': 'This was a location where pull tests were set up for the manufacturer to perform for warranty purposes.
